competitor_offering: Full EPC WHRS package with O&M; leveraging existing relationship at Jamshedpur
thermax_advantage: 10% lower cost; faster delivery by 3 months; proven WHRS track record at similar BF sizes
thermax_disadvantage: L&T has larger EPC brand recognition; deeper Tata relationship at corporate level
strategy: Emphasize technical superiority and lifecycle cost advantage

competitor_offering: WHRS package with bag filter; competitive on price but longer lead time
thermax_advantage: Better performance guarantees; integrated bag filter design; Thermax service proximity in Rajasthan
thermax_disadvantage: 5% premium pricing; ISGEC offers more flexible payment terms
strategy: Offer extended warranty and performance-linked pricing to justify premium

competitor_offering: Linde for hydrogen technology; L&T for utility island EPC
thermax_advantage: Integrated energy + utility offering; single vendor accountability; proven refinery installations
thermax_disadvantage: Linde has proprietary hydrogen tech; L&T has deeper Reliance relationship
strategy: Partner with hydrogen technology licensor to strengthen offering

competitor_offering: BHEL as PSU preferred vendor for FGD; L&T competitive on EPC scale
thermax_advantage: Competitive pricing; better delivery track record on FGD; limestone-gypsum technology proven at scale
thermax_disadvantage: BHEL has PSU preference advantage; longer government procurement cycle favors incumbents
strategy: Focus on technical evaluation score and reference plant performance data

competitor_offering: Process heater package with heat exchangers; strong ME presence
thermax_advantage: Lower total cost; local fabrication capability in India reduces logistics cost; Thermax ME team proximity
thermax_disadvantage: Alfa Laval has stronger brand in process heating in Gulf; longer Aramco vendor history
strategy: Leverage India cost advantage and Thermax ME office relationship
